metadata.description: Claude Code skill for investigating email deliverability on a SaaS platform that sends through SparkPost on behalf of customers.

plugins.name: sparkpost-deliverability
plugins.description: Pulls live SparkPost metrics, runs DNS authentication checks (SPF/DKIM/DMARC), correlates with application logs, and produces evidence-graded deliverability briefs. Includes a first-run customization interview that adapts the skill to the operator's platform name, logging tool, docs publishing system, and tier-routing model.
